scripts.dev:all: docker compose up postgres -d && pnpm --parallel --filter @devboard/backend --filter @devboard/frontend dev
scripts.docker:restart: docker compose down && docker compose build && docker compose up
scripts.clean: find . -name 'node_modules' -type d -prune -exec rm -rf '{}' + && find . -name 'dist' -type d -prune -exec rm -rf '{}' +
scripts.k8s:deploy: kubectl apply -f k8s/postgres/ && kubectl apply -f k8s/backend/ && kubectl apply -f k8s/frontend/ && kubectl apply -f k8s/ingress/
scripts.k8s:delete: kubectl delete -f k8s/ingress/ && kubectl delete -f k8s/frontend/ && kubectl delete -f k8s/backend/ && kubectl delete -f k8s/postgres/
